meta.notes: v2: Researcher validated Jul 5 — added 34 trending terms: grain-free/freeze-dried/premium food keywords, 3 new categories (อาหารเสริม, แชมพู, ที่นอน), 6 new brands (Buzz Beyond, Neez, Lifemate, Deserve, Friskies, Hills), 8.8 campaign expansion, long-tail buyer intent for premium products.

validation.searchVolumeAssessment: Thai pet e-commerce +35% YoY. Core voucher keywords (โค้ดส่วนลด shopee สัตว์เลี้ยง) align with top search patterns on Picodi/SaleDuck/iPriceThailand coupon sites. Grain-free and freeze-dried are rising sub-niches with dedicated Shopee category pages and mybest/productnation review articles — high content competition but strong buyer intent. Brand keywords validated against actual Shopee product listings.
validation.confidence: confirmed — multi-source (Shopee listings, mybest, productnation, Thairath, industry reports)
